header.title: GAME LIBRARY
header.subtitle: Link your accounts, import your games, and launch them from your device.

addDialog.title: Add a game manually
addDialog.launchLinkHint: A protocol link that opens the game on your device (e.g. battlenet://WoW). Only game protocols are allowed.

steam.title: Steam — Auto Import
steam.prompt: Paste your Steam profile URL or ID. Your game details must be public.

other.title: Other Accounts
other.empty: No other accounts linked. Add games manually below.

games.title: My Games
games.empty: No games yet. Link Steam to import automatically, or add a game manually.

toasts.steamLinkFailedDefault: Couldn't link Steam. Check the profile URL and that it's public.
toasts.invalidLaunchError: Launch link must be a supported game protocol (e.g. steam://, battlenet://).
toasts.invalidLaunchDescription: Use a game protocol like steam:// or battlenet://.
toasts.noLaunchLinkDescription: {{name}} has no launch link. Add one to launch it from your device.
toasts.launchingDescription: If nothing opens, make sure the game's client is installed.
